zh.Bretherton, Lancashire, England, United: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾布利黑頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas de Banastre於大約1251年出生在英國藍卡爾辛格登時，他的父親Thomas de Banastre20歲，母親Hawise de Betham35歲。他於1284年與Joan Singleton在英國藍卡爾奧頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1303年之後在英國藍卡爾普雷斯頓，埋葬在英國藍卡爾可洛斯頓。

zh-hans.Bretherton, Lancashire, England, United: 英国英格兰藍卡爾布利黑頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas de Banastre于大约1251年出生在英国藍卡爾辛格登时，他的父亲Thomas de Banastre20岁，母亲Hawise de Betham35岁。他于1284年与Joan Singleton在英国藍卡爾奧頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1303年之后在英国藍卡爾普雷斯頓，埋葬在英国藍卡爾可洛斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas de Banastre was born about 1251, in Singleton, Lancashire, England, his father, Thomas de Banastre, was 20 and his mother, Hawise de Betham, was 35. He married Joan Singleton in 1284, in Aughton, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died after 1303, in Preston, Lancashire, England, and was buried in Croston, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas de Banastre est né environ 1251, à Singleton, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Banastre, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Hawise de Betham, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Joan Singleton en 1284, à Aughton, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé après 1303, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Croston, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas de Banastre um 1251 in Singleton, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas de Banastre 20 und seine Mutter Hawise de Betham 35. Er hat 1284 in Aughton, Lancashire, England Joan Singleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb nach 1303 in Preston, Lancashire, England und wurde in Croston, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Banastre è nato il circa 1251 nel Singleton, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Thomas de Banastre, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Hawise de Betham, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Joan Singleton nel 1284, nel Aughton, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì dopo il 1303, nel Preston, Lancashire, England, e fu sepolto a Croston, Lancashire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas de Banastreが約1251年にイギリスランカシュアイアシングレトンで生まれた時，父Thomas de Banastreは20歳，母Hawise de Bethamは35歳であった。1284年にイギリスランカシュアイアアウトンでJoan Singletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1303年以後にイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンで死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアクロストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas de Banastre(이)가 대략 1251년 영국 랭카실르 징글레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas de Banastre(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Hawise de Betham(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1284년 영국 랭카실르 오턴에서 Joan Singleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1303년 이후 영국 랭카실르 플레스턴에서 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 크로스턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Bretherton, Lancashire, England, United: Bretherton, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas de Banastre nasceu aproximadamente 1251, em Singleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Banastre, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de Betham, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Singleton em 1284, em Aughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu após 1303, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Croston, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas de Banastre родился около 1251 г. в местности синглетон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas de Banastre было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Hawise de Betham, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Singleton в 1284 г. в местности аугтон, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер после 1303 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия и был похоронен в местности кростон, ланкашир, Англия.

sm.about 1251–after 1303: e tusa o le 1251–ina ua ma'ea le 1303

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas de Banastre nació aproximadamente 1251, en Singleton, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Banastre, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Hawise de Betham, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Joan Singleton en 1284, en Aughton, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió después de 1303, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, y fue sepultado en Croston, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
